check incoming and outgoing call history on the iPhone Phone app.

Search and find that contact using the search option at the bottom right corner.

Tap to open the contact profile, and you’re gonna see the call history right under the details section.

Here’s the full list of call history; that’s it. This feature’s available in the iOS 26 update.

snippet.title: iPhone 16 vs iPhone 17 Pro Max | Final Verdict! Price, Camera, Battery, Features Comparison
snippet.description:
iPhone 16 vs iPhone 17 Pro Max | Final Verdict! Price, Camera, Battery, Features Comparison

The iPhone 16 vs iPhone 17 Pro Max comparison reveals just how far Apple has pushed smartphone innovation in 2025. In this detailed video, we compare both flagship models across every major aspect — price, camera, performance, battery life, display quality, and new features — to help you decide which iPhone truly offers better value for your money.

The iPhone 17 Pro Max introduces Apple’s latest A19 Pro chip, offering faster processing, smoother multitasking, and superior gaming performance compared to the A18 Bionic in the iPhone 16. With its Titanium body, upgraded camera sensors, and ProMotion XDR display, the 17 Pro Max stands out as Apple’s most premium and durable phone yet. Meanwhile, the iPhone 16 continues to impress with excellent performance, a balanced battery life, and a more affordable price point, making it a solid choice for everyday users.

We also dive deep into the camera comparison — testing real-world photo and video samples in daylight, night mode, and portrait mode. The iPhone 17 Pro Max’s enhanced 48MP main sensor and improved telephoto lens deliver sharper details and richer colors, while the iPhone 16’s dual-lens system remains ideal for casual photography.
